zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Sanford於1270年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特時，她的父親Laurence de Sanford46歲，母親Hawise de Corbet31歲。她與Walter Foliot結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年在英國英格蘭戴文享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Sanford was born in 1270, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Laurence de Sanford, was 46 and her mother, Hawise de Corbet, was 31. She married Walter Foliot. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1331, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Sanford est née en 1270, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Laurence de Sanford, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Corbet, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Foliot. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1331, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Sanford(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Laurence de Sanford(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Corbet(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Walter Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Sanford родилась в 1270 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Laurence de Sanford было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Corbet, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Foliot. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1331 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
